## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss image implementation strategy for website pages and address concerns about programmatic image generation.](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Manual image selection is more efficient for \~23 pages than building a programmatic workflow](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Stock images from Unsplash and Pixels are suitable for the project](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Suggestion to add cover images to improve page aesthetics](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Marcel will join the next meeting with the client to discuss image strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

## Topics

### Current Image Implementation Status

  - [Fatima has uploaded 3 images so far](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [\~23 pages need images (21 in draft, 3 published)](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Client specified GIFs for use cases at the bottom of pages](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [No cover images currently at the top of pages](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Programmatic vs. Manual Image Selection

  - [Marcel explained that programmatic image generation is not ideal for this project:](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Automated search and placement possible, but not actual image creation](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [Good AI-generated images (e.g., Midjourney) lack API access](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [For 23 pages, manual selection is faster than building a workflow](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [Programmatic approach more suitable for 3000+ pages](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)

### Stock Image Resources

  - [Fatima has access to Unsplash and Pixels for royalty-free images](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Getty Images suggested as a potential source](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Fatima confident in finding suitable images from these resources](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Page Design Considerations

  - [Current design looks "bland" without cover images](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Suggestion to propose adding cover images to improve aesthetics](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Client has decided on GIF placement, but top of page remains empty](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Fatima to continue manual image selection for remaining pages](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Propose adding cover images to improve page design in the next client meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Marcel to join the upcoming meeting to discuss image strategy with the client](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Fatima to clarify client's stance on using royalty-free images in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6NdzjzrnhRfoHrhvUHtDDVocQVmSAuDx?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
